languages.text: "Раз в несколько месяцев я естественным путем вновь вычисляю то, что я безумен, как это и произошло сейчас. И всегда я вновь прихожу к тому же выводу, что и раньше".
"Every few months, I once again spontaneously deduce that I am insane, as I have just done. And I arrive at the same conclusion as before."
languages.original_text: "Раз в несколько месяцев я естественным путем вновь вычисляю то, что я безумен, как это и произошло сейчас. И всегда я вновь прихожу к тому же выводу, что и раньше".

traits.locale_text: "Every few months, I once again spontaneously deduce that I am insane, as I have just done. And I arrive at the same conclusion as before."
"Every few months, I once again spontaneously deduce that I am insane, as I have just done. And I arrive at the same conclusion as before."
"Every few months, I once again spontaneously deduce that I am insane, as I have just done. And I arrive at the same conclusion as before."

languages.text: «Cada pocos meses, deduzco espontáneamente que estoy loco, como acabo de hacer, y llego a la misma conclusión que antes».
languages.original_text: "Every few months, I once again spontaneously deduce that I am insane, as I have just done. And I arrive at the same conclusion as before."

traits.locale_text: «Cada pocos meses, deduzco espontáneamente que estoy loco, como acabo de hacer, y llego a la misma conclusión que antes».

languages.text: “每隔几个月，我就会像刚才那样，重新推断出自己已经疯了。然后再得出和以前一样的结论。”
languages.original_text: "Every few months, I once again spontaneously deduce that I am insane, as I have just done. And I arrive at the same conclusion as before."

traits.locale_text: “每隔几个月，我就会像刚才那样，重新推断出自己已经疯了。然后再得出和以前一样的结论。”

languages.text: « Tous les quelques mois, je déduis spontanément que je suis fou, comme je viens de le faire, et j'en arrive toujours à la même conclusion. »
languages.original_text: "Every few months, I once again spontaneously deduce that I am insane, as I have just done. And I arrive at the same conclusion as before."

traits.locale_text: « Tous les quelques mois, je déduis spontanément que je suis fou, comme je viens de le faire, et j'en arrive toujours à la même conclusion. »

languages.text: "Birkaç ayda bir, tıpkı az önce yaptığım gibi deli olduğumu kendiliğimden tekrar çıkarsıyorum. Bir öncekilerle aynı sonuca varıyorum."
languages.original_text: "Every few months, I once again spontaneously deduce that I am insane, as I have just done. And I arrive at the same conclusion as before."

traits.locale_text: "Birkaç ayda bir, tıpkı az önce yaptığım gibi deli olduğumu kendiliğimden tekrar çıkarsıyorum. Bir öncekilerle aynı sonuca varıyorum."

languages.text: "Alle paar Monate folgere ich wie gerade eben spontan, dass ich verrückt bin. Und ich komme immer zu demselben Schluss."
languages.original_text: "Every few months, I once again spontaneously deduce that I am insane, as I have just done. And I arrive at the same conclusion as before."

traits.locale_text: "Alle paar Monate folgere ich wie gerade eben spontan, dass ich verrückt bin. Und ich komme immer zu demselben Schluss."

languages.text: 「数カ月に一度、私は再び、自分が狂っていると自然に推理する。そして、前と同じ結論に達する。」
languages.original_text: "Every few months, I once again spontaneously deduce that I am insane, as I have just done. And I arrive at the same conclusion as before."

traits.locale_text: 「数カ月に一度、私は再び、自分が狂っていると自然に推理する。そして、前と同じ結論に達する。」
